title: The Broken Script Skin Patches
description:
This Resource Pack Fix The Skin Of Player Being Black The Goal Is Simple Modify The Archive In The Resource Pack To Your Favorite Skin And More Things And I Hope You Like!!!
I Recently Moved To The Smile Guy Organization For Fixes And Join My Organization!
body:
✅You Maybe Know About The Broken Script Right? I Made A Texture Pack That Fix Skin Being Black Even Using Mods Will Fix The Problem But If You Want Not To Use Mods This Texture Pack Can Be Your Solution If You Not Like Mods Or Authentification Of Microsoft! Is Only For Modpacks Only In 1.21.1
-------------------------
⚠️WARNING:Is Advised This Is The One And Only Official And Original Trusted Texture Only In Modrinth. Websites Like 9Minecraft And Others Could Contain Malware! So I Want You To Be Careful! Because I Will Not Be Responsible If The Unofficial Places Destroy Or Damage Your PC Or Other Things If You Download From Other Places Is Your Fault! And Do Not Ask Me For Refund You!
-------------------------
📢Fun Fact About This Texture:Is About Me Who Recently Moved This Texture Pack To My Organization "The Smile Guy" For Fixes Came Just In Time For You Guys!

🚫WARNING!:Reupload This Texture In Websites Like 9Minecraft And Others Is Illegal And Is Not Allowed!❌If You Reupload Anywhere I Will Be Angry And I Will Sue You If This Happen!
